description_long: This is an open, antique-style book with aged, yellowed pages that display faint sketches and handwritten notes, reminiscent of a historical manuscript or a scientific journal. The book's cover is visible only at the edges, showing a dark, possibly leather-bound material with ornate, decorative patterns along the border. The pages are slightly curled and uneven, suggesting frequent use or significant age. The content on the pages includes diagrams, geometric shapes, and cursive writing, all rendered in a sepia or brownish ink. The book is thick, with a substantial number of pages, and the binding appears robust, holding the pages flat and open. There are no visible modern features such as a dust jacket, printed graphics, or publisher marks.
description: An open, antique book with yellowed pages filled with sketches and handwritten notes, bordered by a dark, ornate cover. The pages show signs of age and frequent use.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the front, open wide to reveal both pages filled with faded sketches and writing, with the ornate cover edges visible.
description_view_1: Viewed from the side, the thickness of the book and the uneven, curled edges of the pages are prominent, with less detail visible on the page surfaces.
description_view_2: From the back, the open pages are again visible, showing more of the right page's content and the decorative border of the cover.
description_view_3: This rear side view highlights the book's thickness and the curvature of the open pages, with the content on the left page more visible.
